Home/Agents/Chat & Support/Lead Qualification Agent
Chat Agent

Lead Qualification Agent

A Lead Qualification Agent engages every visitor who raises their hand — on your website, WhatsApp, or landing page — asks your qualification questions conversationally, scores them against your ICP, and either books a meeting for hot leads or adds cold ones to nurture.

Starting at
₹1.5L–2.5L setup + ₹20k/mo $3k–5k setup + $400/mo
Languages
Hindi · English
Built For
B2B SaaSConsulting & agenciesReal estateEdTechFinancial services

How it works.

01

Lead arrives

Fills a form, starts a website chat, or messages your WhatsApp number.

02

Agent engages

'Hi, thanks for reaching out. Quick question — what's the main thing you're trying to solve?'

03

Qualification conversation

Over 3–5 exchanges: pain point, company size, timeline, budget signal, decision authority.

04

Routing

Hot lead → demo booked in calendar. Warm → CRM follow-up task. Cold → nurture sequence.

ROI Math
Without

Form conversion: 30–40% completion, no context on what's driving the inquiry.

→
With Amoris

Conversational qualification: 60–75% completion, full ICP data per lead.

Sales team time spent on qualified leads only — not chasing cold inquiries.

FAQ

Common questions about Lead Qualification Agent.

What qualification questions does the agent ask?
You define them during setup. Typical B2B: company size, current tool/process, pain, timeline, budget range. The agent asks them conversationally, not as a form.
How does it score leads?
You define your ICP criteria with weights. The agent scores each lead 1–100. Hot leads (above your threshold) get pushed to CRM and a Slack alert to your sales team.
What happens to leads that don't qualify?
They're added to a nurture sequence — email drip or WhatsApp follow-up series. Not discarded.
Can it book a demo directly?
Yes. Hot leads can book a demo slot directly in the chat using your Calendly or Google Calendar link.
How is this different from a contact form?
A form collects data. This agent has a conversation. Form completion rates are 30–40%. Conversation completion rates are 60–75%.

Ready to deploy Lead Qualification Agent?

Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll scope your use case and give you a cost on the call.
